note: annotate_types gate ledger for trino — every entry mirrors a deliberate parser divergence (brikk extension #8, same entries in parser-corpus/trino-parser-known-failures.json), not a typing gap

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE people SET PROPERTIES x = 'y'
cases.reason: brikk extension #8: SET PROPERTIES parses into AlterSet instead of sqlglot's Command passthrough, so the annotated dump differs structurally

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE people SET PROPERTIES foo = 123, 'foo bar' = 456
cases.reason: brikk extension #8: SET PROPERTIES parses into AlterSet instead of sqlglot's Command passthrough, so the annotated dump differs structurally

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE people SET PROPERTIES x = DEFAULT
cases.reason: brikk extension #8: SET PROPERTIES parses into AlterSet instead of sqlglot's Command passthrough, so the annotated dump differs structurally
